creator: horia@racoviceanu.com
text:
Created attachment 143734
Fix orphaned file

- Bump PORTREVISION
- Change license from BSD to BSD3CLAUSE
- Replace CHMOD with pkg-plist operator @mode
- Change USE_BZIP2=yes to USES=tar:bzip2
- Add DOCS to Options
- Move patch to Makefile, fix orphaned etc/pam.d/i3lock
- Strip executable
- Change WWW to new URL, replace tab with one space

Build log:
https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140613073443-96343/

May I maintain this port?
